internalEdges.note: Uses file: protocol instead of workspace:* despite pnpm workspace membership — still an internal edge, flagged as a protocol inconsistency

legacy.note: No package.json — external dependencies unknowable from manifests

stackRefinements.core: Plain ESM JavaScript domain layer; zod for schema validation; tests via node --test; no build step
stackRefinements.svc: Fastify v4 HTTP service; TypeScript (tsc build); tests via node --test; consumes @edge/core at runtime and @edge/test-kit in dev
stackRefinements.web: React 18 SPA built with Vite 5; ESM; tests via node --test; consumes @edge/core via file: link
stackRefinements.test-kit: Shared test utility package shipping vitest as a runtime dependency (test-framework provider role), though its own and consumers' test scripts use node --test — mixed test-runner signal
stackRefinements.legacy: CommonJS bundle (module.exports) with no manifest; conflicts with root "type": "module" since it inherits the root package type — stack cannot be confirmed beyond plain JS

ordering.signal: core is the only shared runtime foundation (fan-in from svc and web); test-kit is a dev-time leaf feeding svc; svc and web are independent of each other; legacy is fully disconnected
ordering.notes: Stages are parallelizable within each tier. core and test-kit have no internal deps and can run first in parallel. svc (needs core runtime + test-kit dev) and web (needs core runtime) follow in parallel. legacy has no detected edges in either direction, so its position is unconstrained — placed last only because it is unmappable, not because of a known dependency.

gaps: packages/legacy has no package.json — internal/external dependencies for the legacy layer cannot be mapped from manifests; src/index.js explicitly notes it was checked in without a manifest
packages/legacy/src/index.js uses CommonJS module.exports while inheriting "type": "module" from the workspace root — would fail to load as-is under Node ESM resolution
pnpm-lock.yaml contains only settings (no importers/packages blocks) — lockfile is empty/stale, so resolved versions and transitive dependencies are unverified
packages/web references @edge/core via file:../core instead of the workspace:* protocol used elsewhere — inconsistent linking that pnpm treats differently from workspace links
@edge/test-kit declares vitest as a runtime dependency, but every package's test script runs node --test — test-runner intent is ambiguous
Root package.json defines no scripts — no workspace-level test/build orchestration command detected
